This is a 10.5 cent property with duel ownership Ensure open communication with the co-owner(s) to address any concerns regarding the land’s use, the private way, or the building.In this land there is a unused sheet roofed building.The 1089 sq. ft. sheet-roofed oil mill building may be in a dilapidated or unusable condition, especially if it hasn't been used for years.The deed mentions a 2-meter private way, which indicates that there is a right of access or a pathway through the property, likely for the benefit of another party or as a common access point. If there is no visible demarcation of this pathway on the land, it could cause confusion or disputes in the future, especially if another owner or user needs to access this way.It seems that a private way (access road) on the north side of the property is not in ideal condition for easy access, particularly with the width of 1.5m being narrow and the added issue of the compound wall obstructing the way. This can cause problems, especially if the private way is essential for accessing the property or is contested by other parties.

PLEASE NOTE:-_x000D_ One of the sellers was a minor (9 years old) at the time of this deed documentation_x000D_ North Side: There is a carporch (20.25m2)along the roadside, which is currently being used as firewood storage._x000D_ South Side: There is a small building (8.34m2)with a sheet roof, which serves two purposes: it's used as a work area and also contains a toilet.In this side a natural hill It acts as a physical boundary _x000D_ The property is situated at a higher elevation than the adjacent road. To access the building, a staircase with a width of 1.15 meters is provided. This staircase connects the road level to the building entrance, serving as the primary access pathway.

This a 50 cent multi-level property, with its mix of flat and Slightly sloped terrain. Around 10cent of the property is leveled and the building is situated in this area. The balance 40 cent property is siituated higher than the 10-cent property and it is little bit slopy. Vehicle access are limited only for the 1st 10cent property, from the this property to the next level property there is no vehicle access only have some steps to enter there. East side of the property have big rocks (like small mountain ). In this property there is around 100nos of rubber trees and one storage house around 425sqft, from that trees the owner getting 10-12 rubber sheet per day at this time. Having 2 big roks in this property
